title: 40 Pack 9 Pocket Page Protectors,720 Double Sided Card Holder Pages for a 3 Ring Binder, Card Protector Sheets Baseball Card Binder,Fit for MTG, TCG, Baseball Standard Cards
features: 【Double-sided display】 - 9 double-sided display pocket trading cards per page are used for 3 ring binder, 9 pocket trading cards can hold 18 cards, 40 pages can hold 720 cards. Card page size: 11.6 x 8.7 inches, each pocket size: 3.7 x 2.6 inches, each pocket can hold 2 1/2 x 3 1/2 cards. Ensures your favorite cards securely stored and neatly organized.

【Super Protection-Premium Quality】 - Our baseball card sleeves are high quality, non-PVC and acid-free polypropylene ensures it sturdy and durable,and prevents it from damaging and scratching, protecting your cards. It's perfect for showcasing your precious trading cards or artist sketch cards and more.

【Super Transparent & Waterproof 】- Sport card sleeves are made of transparent and waterproof materials, your card will be clearly displayed in the trading sleeve, with a top design to facilitate you to insert the card and prevent the card from slipping off. The reinforced edges provide for long-term protection and organization. It is crystal clear for you to see your card information.

【Wide Application】 -Our clear sheet protectors are suitable for all standard sized trading cards. Perfect for collecting, storing or presenting your various cards - sports cards (baseball cards / football cards), game cards (mtg/yugioh cards), trading cards, business cards, mini photos or other cards.

【Quality Service 】- If you are not satisfied after receiving our page protectors , please feel free to contact us, we will reply you within 24 hours and we will refund or exchange it unconditionally. Let you buy with confidence!
